title: douxPR's 3D Totem of Undying
description: A 3D Model of the Totem of Undying in black with devlish horns!
body: **WELCOME!** First off, the reason for even making this in the first place was due to all the lacking customization of actual good 3D totems. I incorporated some of my own ideas into this totem and this is what I feel like the undying of totem should look like in my eyes. Minecraft lacks the explanation of the creation of the totem. I see the totem as a tool of good and evil depending on who is using it who is why it has angel like wings, and horns! ![3D Render of the totem.](https://i.imgur.com/YsfdEx6.png) **The totem in a item frame** ![The totem in a item frame.](https://i.imgur.com/FPJhZV1.png) **The totem in hand** ![The totem in hand.](https://i.imgur.com/EUcYHxH.jpg)
